payload.content: Every factual statement in your summary must cite the passage title it came from in the form '[Title]: <statement>'. If a statement cannot be tied to a specific retrieved passage, omit it.

rationale: Mirror of HoVer vbo_cite_titles. HotpotQA's GEPA summarize1 emphasizes structure but not strict per-statement title-grounding; this feature isolates the citation discipline.
